title: Did the Fed change course? The Market may be asking the wrong question
section_path: Did the Fed change course? The Market may be asking the wrong question
section_path_text: Did the Fed change course? The Market may be asking the wrong question
summary:
Main
By George Lagarias
The three things investors need to know in the closing week of the year
The Fed's dovish internal survey (the Dot Plot) which suggested three rate cuts in 2024 has unleashed trader animal spirts. Markets are now pricing in six rate cuts next year, beginning in March. Fed officials have already been trying to backtrack the bullishness.
